---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Problem

What are you trying to do that Calivi does not support today?

### Proposed solution

What you would like to happen.

### Scope / alternatives

Anything you have considered, and how big you think the change is. If it touches the
security model, the tool loop, or the provider layer, see `ARCHITECTURE.md` first —
some designs there are deliberate.
